summary: ANDROID | Falcon Grey | EQ settings not saved for Custom
scenario: Custom EQ settings are not persisted after saving and reopening the EQ settings page on Poly Studio Mobile app
description_clean: Custom EQ settings are not saved after clicking Save and reopening the EQ settings page. Steps: connect device, go to EQ settings, make changes, click Save, reopen EQ settings — settings are lost. Expected: settings persist after saving.
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Connect a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Make custom changes to the EQ bands (e.g., adjust sliders for bass, mid, treble).
5. Tap the Save button to save the custom EQ settings.
6. Exit the Equalizer settings page (e.g., tap Back or navigate away).
7. Reopen the Equalizer settings page via Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
expected: The custom EQ settings (slider positions) should persist and appear exactly as saved in step 5.
actual: The custom EQ settings are lost — sliders return to default positions or the previously saved custom profile is not shown.
